---
title: "Post-hoc model evaluation"
author: "Puck Quarles van Ufford"
date: today
format: html
---

# Set up

```{r}
#| label: packages
#| message: false
#| echo: true

library("tidyverse")
library("ggrepel")
library("patchwork")
library("caret")
library("survival")
```

```{r}
#| label: seed
#| echo: true

set.seed(8)
```

# Formulas

```{r}
#| label: feature_inclusion_stepwise_Cox
#| echo: true

# Calculate Jaccard similarity score
jaccard <- function(a, b) {
  length(intersect(a, b)) / length(union(a, b))
}
```

# Load data

```{r}
#| label: load_data
#| message: false
#| echo: true

data_os <- read_tsv(file = "../data/03_data_train_os.tsv")

data_dfs <- read_tsv(file = "../data/03_data_train_dfs.tsv")
```

# Load results

```{r}
#| label: load_results
#| message: false
#| echo: true

results_stepwise_cox_os_100 <- read_tsv("../results/06_res_per_fold_OS_100_max.tsv")

results_stepwise_cox_dfs_100 <- read_tsv("../results/06_res_per_fold_DFS_100_max.tsv")
```

# Features being selected 

## Forward stepwise Cox models

```{r}
#| label: feature_selection_stepwise_cox_os
#| message: false
#| echo: true

summary_stepwise_cox_os_100 <- results_stepwise_cox_os_100 |> 
  group_by(added_feature) |> 
  summarise(times_included = n()/5,
            when_included = round(mean(iteration))) 

count_times_included <- summary_stepwise_cox_os_100 |> 
  count(times_included)

top_10_features_os <- results_stepwise_cox_os_100 |> 
  filter(iteration <= 10) |> 
  group_by(fold) |> 
  summarise(features = list(added_feature),
            .groups = "drop")

similarity_stepwise_cox_os <- crossing(fold_i = top_10_features_os$fold,
                                       fold_j = top_10_features_os$fold) |> 
  filter(fold_i < fold_j) |> 
  rowwise() |> 
  mutate(jaccard = jaccard(top_10_features_os$features[[which(top_10_features_os$fold == fold_i)]],
                           top_10_features_os$features[[which(top_10_features_os$fold == fold_j)]])) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  summarise(mean_jaccard = mean(jaccard),
            sd_jaccard = sd(jaccard))

summary_stepwise_cox_os_100 |> 
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = as_factor(times_included),
                       y = when_included)) +
  geom_boxplot(color = "darkgrey") +
  geom_point(data = \(df) df |> 
               filter(times_included == 1)) +
  geom_text_repel(data = \(df) df |> 
                    filter(times_included == 1),
                  mapping = aes(label = added_feature),
                  size = 3,
                  max.overlaps = Inf) + 
  geom_text(data = count_times_included,
            mapping = aes(x = as_factor(times_included),
                          y = Inf,
                          label = paste0("n = ", n)),
            vjust = 1.3,
            color = "black",
            size = 3.5,
            inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Feature inclusion in forward stepwise Cox model (OS)",
       subtitle = paste0("Feature sets included: all (100 max). Jaccard similarity top 10 features: ",
                         round(similarity_stepwise_cox_os[1], 2),
                         " (sd ",
                         round(similarity_stepwise_cox_os[2], 2),
                         ")"),
       x = "Fraction of folds that feature was selected",
       y = "Mean iteration that feature was selected") +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave("../results/09_feature_selection_plot_stepwise_cox_OS.png")
```

```{r}
#| label: feature_selection_stepwise_cox_dfs
#| message: false
#| echo: true

summary_stepwise_cox_dfs_100 <- results_stepwise_cox_dfs_100 |> 
  group_by(added_feature) |> 
  summarise(times_included = n()/5,
            when_included = round(mean(iteration))) 

count_times_included <- summary_stepwise_cox_dfs_100 |> 
  count(times_included)

top_10_features_dfs <- results_stepwise_cox_dfs_100 |> 
  filter(iteration <= 10) |> 
  group_by(fold) |> 
  summarise(features = list(added_feature),
            .groups = "drop")

similarity_stepwise_cox_dfs <- crossing(fold_i = top_10_features_dfs$fold,
                                        fold_j = top_10_features_dfs$fold) |> 
  filter(fold_i < fold_j) |> 
  rowwise() |> 
  mutate(jaccard = jaccard(top_10_features_dfs$features[[which(top_10_features_dfs$fold == fold_i)]],
                           top_10_features_dfs$features[[which(top_10_features_dfs$fold == fold_j)]])) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  summarise(mean_jaccard = mean(jaccard),
            sd_jaccard = sd(jaccard))

summary_stepwise_cox_dfs_100 |> 
  ggplot(mapping = aes(x = as_factor(times_included),
                       y = when_included)) +
  geom_boxplot(color = "darkgrey") +
  geom_point(data = \(df) df |> 
               filter(times_included == 1)) +
  geom_text_repel(data = \(df) df |> 
                    filter(times_included == 1),
                  mapping = aes(label = added_feature),
                  size = 3,
                  max.overlaps = Inf) + 
  geom_text(data = count_times_included,
            mapping = aes(x = as_factor(times_included),
                          y = Inf,
                          label = paste0("n = ", n)),
            vjust = 1.3,
            color = "black",
            size = 3.5,
            inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  labs(title = "Feature inclusion in forward stepwise Cox model (DFS)",
       subtitle = paste0("Feature sets included: all (100 max). Jaccard similarity top 10 features: ",
                         round(similarity_stepwise_cox_dfs[1], 2),
                         " (sd ",
                         round(similarity_stepwise_cox_dfs[2], 2),
                         ")"),
       x = "Fraction of folds that feature was selected",
       y = "Mean iteration that feature was selected") +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave("../results/09_feature_selection_plot_stepwise_cox_DFS.png")
```

# Set up cross-validation

```{r}
#| label: 5_fold_CV
#| echo: true

folds_os <- createFolds(data_os$os_status,
                        k = 5,
                        list = TRUE,
                        returnTrain = FALSE)

folds_dfs <- createFolds(data_dfs$dfs_status,
                         k = 5,
                         list = TRUE,
                         returnTrain = FALSE)
```

# Check feature importance

```{r}
#| label: forward_stepwise_Cox_function
#| echo: true

forward_cox <- function(data,
                        time_var,
                        status_var, 
                        folds, 
                        top_10) {
  models <- list()

  outcome_cols <- c(time_var, 
                    status_var)
  
  all_features <- setdiff(colnames(data),
                          c(outcome_cols, 
                            "patient_id", 
                            "sample_id"))

  for (k in seq_along(folds)) {

    test_idx  <- folds[[k]]
    train_idx <- setdiff(seq_len(nrow(data)),
                         test_idx)

    data_train <- data[train_idx, ]
    data_test  <- data[test_idx, ]

    features <- unlist(top_10[k, 2])
    
    formula <- as.formula(paste0(
      "Surv(", time_var, ", ", status_var,  ") ~ ",
      paste(features,
            collapse = " + ")))
    
    model <- coxph(formula,
                   data = data_train)
    
    models[[length(models) + 1]]  <- model
  }
  
  return(models)
  }
```

```{r}
models_os <- forward_cox(data_os,
                         "years_to_os_event",
                         "os_status",
                         folds_os, 
                         top_10_features_os)

betas_os <- list()

for(i in seq(1:5)) {
  model <- unlist(models_os[i])
  
  features <- names(model[1:10]) |> 
    str_remove("^coefficients\\.")
  
  betas <- as.numeric(model[1:10])
  
  betas_os[[i]] <- tibble(feature = features,
                        beta = betas,
                        fold = i)
  }

betas_os <- bind_rows(betas_os)

betas_os |> 
  group_by(feature) |> 
  summarise(times_selected = n(),
            mean_beta = mean(beta),
            lower_95 = quantile(beta, 0.025),
            upper_95 = quantile(beta, 0.975)) |>
 ggplot(mapping = aes(y = reorder(feature, 
                                  times_selected),
                      x = mean_beta,
                      color = as.character(times_selected))) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbarh(mapping = aes(xmin = lower_95, 
                               xmax = upper_95)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Betas of top 10 features forward stepwise Cox (OS)",
       y = NULL,
       x = "Mean beta (95% CI)",
       color = "Selected in n folds") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave("../results/09_beta_top10_plot_stepwise_cox_OS.png")

```

```{r}
models_dfs <- forward_cox(data_dfs,
                          "years_to_dfs_event",
                          "dfs_status",
                          folds_dfs, 
                          top_10_features_dfs)

betas_dfs <- list()

for(i in seq(1:5)) {
  model <- unlist(models_dfs[i])
  
  features <- names(model[1:10]) |> 
    str_remove("^coefficients\\.")
  
  betas <- as.numeric(model[1:10])
  
  betas_dfs[[i]] <- tibble(feature = features,
                        beta = betas,
                        fold = i)
  }

betas_dfs <- bind_rows(betas_dfs)

betas_dfs |> 
  group_by(feature) |> 
  summarise(times_selected = n(),
            mean_beta = mean(beta),
            lower_95 = quantile(beta, 0.025),
            upper_95 = quantile(beta, 0.975)) |>
 ggplot(mapping = aes(y = reorder(feature, 
                                  times_selected),
                      x = mean_beta,
                      color = as.character(times_selected))) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_errorbarh(mapping = aes(xmin = lower_95, 
                               xmax = upper_95)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Betas of top 10 features forward stepwise Cox (DFS)",
       y = NULL,
       x = "Mean beta (95% CI)",
       color = "Selected in n folds") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave("../results/09_beta_top10_plot_stepwise_cox_DFS.png")

```
